Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Venice Reds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Rod's Honey Hole
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Rod's Honey Hole
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you have never been to Alaska before, these next three episodes are an absolute must-see. The crew heads to Glacier Bay National Park, Alaska, to meet up with Alaskan Anglers Inn for an epic week of fishing. This fishing destination is unique in more ways than one. Not only does Shea McIntee and the rest of the crew get a chance to fish for the famous and bucket list fish, wild Alaskan Halibut, due to the glorious summer weather, they also get to see stunning wildlife in and out of the water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner, Ron Dohm Jr. and Chad Ditts spend the day spotting and dropping on big Lake Michigan Lakers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fast Action Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | More Spring Walleyes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We head out for another day of fishing in the gem of Baja Mexico, and catch a personal best.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Hot Bite in Baja, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A friendly Father and Son challenge, chasing big walleye in Longlac, Ontario, Canada
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Father & Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. It's late July and fishing is very good for a variety of different species all across the Upper Midwest. We're gonna share with you some great tactics for walleye, largemouth bass, smallmouth bass and muskie, with special guests Brian Brosdahl, James Lindner and Jeremy Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: World War II Veteran Dominic Errichiello saw everything from the Shores of Normandy on D-Day to the fiercest moments of the Battle of the Bulge, and is eternally grateful that he made it home to create the thing he cares about most: Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Normandy Veteran Dominic Errichiello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode, we explain how to catch river walleyes in the early spring months. Also, we take a look at the operations conducted by the WI DNR in regards to the walleye population on the Menominee River with electro-fishing and tagging.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Spring River Walleyes & WI DNR Electro-fishing Study
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Alabama Thaw
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Alabama Thaw
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James and Al Lindner head to the Alexandria area to catch smallmouth bass using some proven and new finesse tactics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finesse Tactics For Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lake X Largemouths
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lake X Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry delivers loads of tips and tricks on catching walleye.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Walleye Slam 2022

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Spinnerbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Salty Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Fall Changes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with the 2025 Angler of the year and Rookie od the year, Major League Fishing Pro, Banks Shaw.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Banks Shaw
Video.title: Episode 1
